ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "track" TEXT /* Track to which the paper is submitted (e.g., Poster, Technical Paper) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the paper (e.g., Submitted, Under Review, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was submitted */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary author */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Unique digital object identifier for each paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* List of keywords related to the paper */,
  "references" TEXT /* List of references cited in the paper */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the uploaded paper file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., University, Institution) */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Reviewer's recommendation (e.g., accept, reject, revise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper that contains the citation */,
  "cited_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being cited */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-citation) */,
  "citation_year" INTEGER /* Year the citation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_authors" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)
column_names: Track to which the paper is submitted (e.g., Poster, Technical Paper)
